summary: Comprehensive Mobile Dashboard API Testing Complete - All 24 backend tests passed. All API endpoints required by the mobile app dashboards (CEO, Manager, Owner) and operational modules (TAP, Table, KDS, Rewards) are working correctly and returning the expected data structures. Web app landing page and dashboard are accessible.

auth_login_ceo.details: CEO login with garcia.rapha2@gmail.com / 12345 returns access_token and user object

ceo_health.details: Returns kpis object with mrr, active_companies, active_venues

ceo_revenue.details: Returns chart array with period, revenue, profit, fees data points

ceo_pipeline.details: Returns pipeline object with leads, paid, activated, active, at_risk, cancelled

ceo_users.details: Returns users array with email, status, roles

manager_overview.details: Returns kpis (revenue_today, revenue_week, open_tabs, avg_ticket), charts, alerts

manager_staff.details: Returns staff array with email, role, status and barmen array

manager_reports_sales.details: Returns period, by_item array, by_method array

manager_tips_detail.details: Returns tips array, total_tips, count, by_server

manager_guests.details: Returns guests array with total count

owner_dashboard_business.details: Returns kpis with revenue_mtd, venues array with health, revenue_today

owner_finance.details: Returns revenue_month, payments array, voids_summary object, risk_score, chargebacks

owner_insights.details: Returns insights array with rule-based AI insights

tap_catalog.details: Returns items array with id, name, price, category

table_tables.details: Returns tables array with id, table_number, status, capacity

kds_tickets.details: Returns tickets array with id, status, destination, items

tap_sessions_open.details: Returns sessions array for open tabs

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing demo data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive Mobile Dashboard API testing complete. All 24 endpoints tested and working. This iteration expanded coverage from 17 endpoints (iteration 90) to 24 endpoints including: /api/manager/shifts, /api/manager/tips-detail, /api/manager/guests, /api/owner/growth, /api/owner/insights, /api/owner/system, /api/tap/catalog, web app landing page (/), and dashboard (/app). The mobile app (React Native/Expo in /app/mobile/) consumes these APIs via the services in /app/mobile/src/services/. Response format is {success: true, data: {...}, error: null} wrapped by StandardResponseMiddleware. All APIs require Bearer token authentication. CEO role required for /api/ceo/* endpoints.
